A failback on some network switches in order to restore full operation after Wednesday’s electrical issues. There will be a 5~15 minute wired and wireless network outage in the locations listed below. We expect all network service to be restored by 7

We expect all network service to be restored by 7AM. Soda 4F (north side only) Soda 7F Cory 1F Cory 5F Update 3/16 06:44: This work has been completed and all networks are back online. Please contact us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you notice any is

us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you notice any issues. On Saturday, March 16th, between 11AM and 1PM, we will be replacing the network switch which provides wi-fi service for the first and second floors of Soda Hall. Wi-fi networks on these floors w

ors of Soda Hall. Wi-fi networks on these floors will experience some interruptions during this time. Update 3/16 11:57: This work has been completed. Please email help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you have any network connectivity issues. We have experience

ny network connectivity issues. We have experienced some scattered network outages due to an apparent power issue, beginning this afternoon at 12:40. Networks in the following areas are known to have experienced an outage: Cory 1F wired Cory 1F and 5

ecovered by 13:00, but may still experience some interruptions as the electrical issue is not fully resolved. Please email us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you have any questions. Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, March 12

Due to a configuration error, many IRIS-hosted websites such as people.eecs.berkeley.edu, www2.eecs, iris2.eecs, and other, were unavailable beginning at around 5:27pm earlier today. The problem was resolved around 5:41pm. We apologize for the inconv

esolved around 5:41pm. We apologize for the inconvenience. Tuesday, February 13th, between 12:00 and 1:30 PM, we will be performing network maintenance on one of the NetApp file servers which provides home and project file storage. We expect no notic

home and project file storage. We expect no noticeable impact from this work, but there is the possibility for some increased latency and/or packet loss to the file servers. We will be monitoring for any performance issues and will be prepared to ro
